content.text: {"title":"Client fetches user details","slug":"client-fetches-user-details","intent":"An API client needs to retrieve a specific user's current data.","story":"The client requests a user by identifier.","expected_behavior":"The API returns the matching user details.","boundaries":"This story does not cover listing all users.","auditable_claims":["The get user route is user-facing."],"evidence":{"tests":[],"surface":["route: GET /api/users/:id"],"docs":[]}}
